text.title: React Component Patterns
text.summary: Function components with typed props, hooks best practices, context with runtime guard, and state management decision tree.

rule.statement: Use function declarations (not arrow functions) for components. Define a Props interface. Return React.ReactElement (not JSX.Element or React.FC).
rule.rationale: Function declarations are hoisted and easier to read in stack traces. React.ReactElement is more accurate than JSX.Element for components that must return something.

list.item: Server state (API data) → TanStack Query / SWR
Global UI state (theme, sidebar) → Zustand (simple) / Jotai (atomic)
